title: Frontend Developer (React) (Remote)
description: Role: Frontend Developer (React) (Remote) Location: Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type: Contract Payout: $30 - $100/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Frontend Developer (React) to work on a contract basis. The role involves building and maintaining responsive web applications using modern frontend technologies. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality user interfaces and improve application performance. Key Responsibilities: • Develop and maintain user interfaces using React.js and related libraries • Implement responsive design principles to ensure compatibility across devices • Write clean, maintainable, and efficient JavaScript/TypeScript code • Collaborate with designers and backend developers to integrate frontend components with APIs • Optimize application performance and ensure cross-browser compatibility Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in React.js and modern frontend development tools • Strong understanding of JavaScript/TypeScript and state management • Experience with responsive design and CSS frameworks • Familiarity with RESTful APIs and frontend integration • Ability to write clean, modular, and maintainable code More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of scalable web applications. The project focuses on delivering seamless user experiences across multiple platforms. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Node.js Developer (Remote)
description: Role : Node.js Developer (Remote) Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type: Contract Payout : $30 - $90/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Node.Js Developer to work on a contract basis. The role involves building and maintaining scalable server-side applications using Node.js, ensuring high performance and reliability. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver efficient backend solutions. Key Responsibilities: • Develop and optimize backend services using Node.js to support application functionality. • Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code following best practices. • Troubleshoot and debug issues to ensure system stability and performance. • Integrate with databases and third-party APIs to enhance application capabilities. • Participate in code reviews and contribute to architectural decisions. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in Node.js and JavaScript with a minimum of 2 years of relevant experience. • Experience with RESTful API development and integration. • Familiarity with database systems such as MongoDB or PostgreSQL. • Knowledge of version control systems, including Git. • Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Software Development industry, contributing to the enhancement of scalable and high-performance backend systems. The contract duration is flexible, with potential for long-term engagement based on project needs. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Senior Full Stack Engineer - AI Products Remote)
description: Role : Senior Full Stack Engineer - AI Products Remote) Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type : Contract Payout : $30 - $90/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Senior Full Stack Engineer to work on a contract basis. The role involves developing and maintaining scalable web applications, optimizing system performance, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions. Key Responsibilities: • Design, develop, and deploy full stack web applications using modern frameworks and technologies. • Lead architectural decisions to ensure scalability, reliability, and security of the platform. • Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code while adhering to best practices. • Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues across the stack. • Mentor junior engineers and contribute to code reviews to maintain high development standards. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in JavaScript, TypeScript, and modern frontend frameworks such as React or Vue.js. • Experience with backend development in Node.js, Python, or similar languages. • Strong understanding of RESTful APIs, microservices architecture, and database design. • Knowledge of DevOps practices including CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and cloud platforms like AWS or Azure. • Experience with testing frameworks and automated testing strategies. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Software Development industry, contributing to the evolution of a high-performance platform serving thousands of users. The contract position provides flexibility to work from anywhere while solving complex technical challenges. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Java Backend Developer (Remote)
description: Role : Java Backend Developer (Remote) Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type : Contract Payout : $30 - $80/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Java Developer to work on a contract basis. The role involves building and maintaining scalable Java applications, optimizing system performance, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions. Key Responsibilities: • Design, develop, test, and deploy Java-based applications and services. • Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code following best practices. • Debug and resolve technical issues in existing Java applications. • Collaborate with product managers and engineers to define and implement system requirements. • Participate in code reviews and contribute to architectural discussions. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in Java (Core Java, J2EE) and related frameworks. • Experience with Spring Boot, Hibernate, or similar technologies. • Knowledge of RESTful APIs and microservices architecture. • Familiarity with databases (SQL and NoSQL) and version control systems. • Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in an Agile environment. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Software Development industry, contributing to the development of enterprise-level applications. The contract duration is flexible, and the position allows for remote work from anywhere. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Backend Developer
description: Founded in 2012, Obilet.com is a comprehensive travel and tourism platform offering bus, flight, and ferry ticketing, along with hotel bookings and car rentals. With its advanced SaaS Inventory Management System (IMS) supporting bus carriers, over 25 million monthly visitors, and more than 15 million app downloads, Obilet is the leading player in both B2B and B2C markets in Türkiye and the Eastern European region. Obilet has reached an agreement with BlaBlaCar for a strategic investment in exchange for a majority share in 2024. With more than 50 million transactions projected for 2026, Obilet continues its international expansion with the ambition of becoming one of the world's leading travel tech companies. Main responsibilities will include: As a backend developer, you will take end-to-end responsibility for developing and delivering new features of obilet.com's B2B applications and business API along with the current system's maintenance Contributing to design and development phases for obilet application's B2B backend and SOAP and Restful business API Identifying, investigating, and implementing applicable solutions to business requirements Ensure obilet B2B application and business API meet current standards & accessibility requirements Following industry best practices in design and product development, also taking initiative in recommending possible enhancements To be successful in this role, you need to have: BS degree in Computer, Electronics Engineering or equivalent departments 2+ years of experience in developing and maintaining products with real-world usage in .Net Framework and .Net Core Experience in web services - RESTful services with .NET Core API and Soap Xml web services with .Net Framework Experience in developing web applications with critical mobile compatibility and cross-browser compatibility requirements Experience in web services - RESTful services with ASP NetWeb API and Soap Xml web services with .Net Framework Good knowledge of MSSQL Server Proficient in using AI development tools (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude) with effective prompt engineering to improve development productivity. Experience with Docker, AWS Services, Elastic Cache, Open Search, SQS, RDL Reporting Tool is a plus Devops, CI-CD experience, Version Control Tool (Git/Github) Strong English skills to follow the technical literature is a plus What we offer: 🏠 Remote Working: We work remotely, but our offices are always open for us 🎂 Birthday Leave: In the month of our birthday, we can take a day off on any day we choose 📅 Flexible Working Hours: On the days we come to the office, we set our own start time with our flexible working model 🎉 Happy Hours & Company Events: With our New Year’s Event, #obiletfest and Happy Hours, we not only strive for success but also have a lot of fun along the way 📚 Self-Development: Your growth is our focus, with access to online learning platforms like Udemy and various training programs designed to support your professional development 🌟 Best-in-class Teammates: We are all the best in our fields and we are confident about it 🤠 No Dress Code: We have no dress code. We can set the trend in our office with our style ☕ Free Snacks & Drinks: Surprise breakfasts, desserts and fruits might be waiting for us in our office

title: Senior Backend Developer
description: ABOUT Jotform Jotform is a San Francisco-based SaaS company with more than 35 million users worldwide. We are thriving and growing, and we’ve never needed outside funding. That’s because we like keeping things agile, independent and fun. Jotform believes everyone should be able to create their own online forms. Our 10,000+ ready-made form templates, 100+ integrations and more than 380 widgets have made us one of the most popular online form builders for organizations of all sizes — from small businesses to enterprises. Since our inception in 2006, our mission has been to help users create, manage and share online forms and receive responses in the easiest way possible. ABOUT THE ROLE As a rapidly growing company, Jotform is seeking a Senior Backend Developer in our İzmir office, located at a relaxed fun environment in Teknopark İzmir. Here’s what you will be doing: Work closely with product management, front end developers, devOps and designers Design, build and deploy new features for Jotform Deliver solutions in a continuous integration flow to production having 35 million users Review and iterate architecture to ensure scale along with the growth Education & Work Experience & Technical Requirements: BS Degree in Computer Science/Engineering or related technical field or equivalent practical experience 5+ year experience building web applications Proficiency in PHP Familiarity with Distributed Systems programming Experience in SaaS and high traffic applications are highly preferred Understanding of HTML, CSS, Javascript, React and other web technologies Solid understanding of OOP principles Working experience with CI/CD and related tools like Git and Jenkins Ability to write high-performance, maintainable and reusable code Excellent command of English Personal Specifications/Skills: Demonstrated ability to work independently with minimal supervision A passion to learn and keep up with the latest technologies Jotform PERKS High growth-paced environment with collaborative and unique team culture Generous market competitive total compensation package Health Insurance Professional Growth & Career Opportunities: We support your personal and professional development with educational materials and expenses & relevant conferences abroad to stay up to date with the latest industry trends & online courses or coaching - and support you pursuing ones that you are passionate about! Challenging projects, regular feedback, healthy competition Fun & Relax working environment: When we’re in the office; music, jeans and t-shirts are the norm & kitchens stocked with healthy & tasty snacks & drinks OUR PROCESS We’ll review your application along with all the others we receive and pick the top profiles for a screening call. In many cases due to time constraints and our candidate volume, only the short-listed candidates are contacted but we do consider each application carefully. If you have been selected as a short-listed candidate, we will contact you for a short screening call to get to know you better. If you don’t get a call, please don’t be disappointed! We receive many applications for each role and have to prioritize who we speak to. Thank you for taking the time to apply for a position at Jotform! Jotform is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. https://www.jotform.com/job-applicant-privacy/

title: İş Analisti ve Java Full Stack Developer
description: İş Analisti (POS Sistemleri)Pozisyon Hakkında Ekibimize katılacak, POS sistemleri konusunda deneyimli, teknik ekiplerle yakın çalışabilecek ve geliştirme takımları içerisinde analiz faaliyetlerini yürütebilecek İş Analisti arıyoruz. Bu rolde, ödeme sistemleri ve POS uygulamalarına yönelik analiz, gereksinim yönetimi ve entegrasyon süreçlerinde aktif görev alacak, iş ihtiyaçlarını teknik çözümlere dönüştürecek ve paydaşlar arasında koordinasyonu sağlayacaksınız. Aranan Nitelikler Üniversitelerin ilgili bölümlerinden mezun (Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği, Yönetim Bilişim Sistemleri veya benzeri) İş Analisti olarak 2–4 yıl deneyim sahibi POS sistemleri ve ödeme teknolojileri konusunda deneyimli İş birimi yerine yazılım geliştirme ekipleri içerisinde analist olarak görev almış SQL bilgisi güçlü, veri analizi ve sorgulama konularında yetkin Agile/Scrum metodolojileri ile çalışan ekiplerde deneyim sahibi Gereksinim analizi, dokümantasyon ve süreç modelleme konularında deneyimli POS vendorları ve üçüncü parti sağlayıcılarla iletişim ve koordinasyon süreçlerinde görev almış Analitik düşünme, problem çözme ve iletişim becerileri güçlü Tercihen iyi seviyede İngilizce bilgisine sahip Sorumluluklar İş gereksinimlerini analiz ederek fonksiyonel ve teknik dokümantasyon hazırlamak Yazılım geliştirme ekipleri ile iş birimleri arasında köprü görevi görmek POS sistemleri ve ödeme süreçlerine ilişkin analiz çalışmalarını yürütmek Kullanıcı hikayeleri (User Story), kabul kriterleri ve iş gereksinimlerini oluşturmak Vendor ve üçüncü parti entegrasyon süreçlerini takip etmek Test senaryolarının hazırlanmasına destek olmak ve kullanıcı kabul testlerinde aktif rol almak Agile ekiplerde sprint planlama, refinement ve diğer çevik süreçlere katkı sağlamak Mevcut süreçlerin iyileştirilmesine yönelik öneriler geliştirmek Tercih Sebebi Olacak Deneyimler POS sertifikasyon süreçlerinde görev almış olmak Online işlem yönetimi (Transaction Management) ve ödeme akışları konusunda bilgi sahibi olmak Bankacılık, fintech veya ödeme sistemleri projelerinde deneyim sahibi olmak ISO 8583 mesajlaşma yapısı ve kartlı ödeme sistemleri konusunda bilgi sahibi olmak İş açıklaması; Java Full Stack Developer Aranan Nitelikler - Java teknolojileri ile en az 2-3 yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme deneyimine sahip, - Spring Boot, Spring MVC ve Spring Data JPA teknolojilerine hakim, - RESTful API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerinde deneyimli, - React.js kullanarak frontend geliştirme tecrübesi bulunan, - SQL bilgisi güçlü, tercihen Oracle Database deneyimine sahip, - Katmanlı mimari, Nesne Yönelimli Programlama (OOP), SOLID prensipleri ve - Clean Code yaklaşımına hakim, - Unit Test geliştirme konusunda deneyimli (JUnit, Mockito vb.) ve kod kalitesi süreçlerine önem veren, - Git versiyon kontrol sistemini etkin şekilde kullanabilen, - Microservice mimarisi hakkında bilgi sahibi, - Agile/Scrum metodolojileri ile çalışmış, - Takım çalışmasına yatkın, analitik düşünme ve problem çözme becerileri güçlü. Tercih Sebepleri - Bankacılık, finans veya ödeme sistemleri projelerinde görev almış, - EFT, FAST, Havale, Sanal POS ve kartlı ödeme sistemleri konusunda bilgi sahibi, - Kafka, Redis, Docker ve Kubernetes teknolojileri ile çalışmış, - SonarQube veya benzeri kod kalite ve statik analiz araçlarını kullanmış. İş Tanımı - Java ve React tabanlı uygulamaların geliştirilmesi, iyileştirilmesi ve bakım süreçlerinde görev almak, - Yeni servislerin ve REST API'lerin geliştirilmesini sağlamak, - Mevcut sistemlerin performans, güvenlik ve sürdürülebilirlik açısından iyileştirilmesine katkıda bulunmak, - Kod kalitesi standartlarına uygun geliştirme yapmak ve code review süreçlerine katılmak, - Agile ekip yapısı içerisinde analiz, geliştirme, test ve canlıya geçiş süreçlerinde aktif rol almak.

title: Backend Developer / Full Stack Developer
description: NETAŞ olarak güçlü Ar-Ge birikimimizi, Türkiye’nin lider kurumlarının dijital dönüşüm yolculuklarında değer yaratmak için kullanıyoruz. Bu kapsamda, bir iş ortağımızın yürüttüğü projede ve müşteri lokasyonunda görev alacak Backend Developer arıyoruz. Aranan Nitelikler Bilgisayar Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerden mezun Bankacılık / finans projelerinde 5+ yıl yazılım geliştirme deneyimi Backend geliştirme deneyimi (Java / Spring Boot veya C# / .NET Core) RESTful API ve REST / SOAP servis geliştirme deneyimi Microservice mimarisi hakkında bilgi sahibi SQL ve veri modelleme konusunda deneyimli Mesajlaşma sistemleri (Kafka, RabbitMQ vb.) ile çalışma deneyimi Core banking sistemleri (tercihen Symphony) ile geliştirme ve entegrasyon deneyimi Git ve CI/CD süreçleri konusunda deneyim Unit ve Integration test yazma deneyimi Docker / Kubernetes gibi container teknolojilerinde deneyimli Jira & Confluence araçlarını kullanmış Agile / Scrum metodolojileri ile çalışma deneyimi Yüksek trafikli production sistemlerde geliştirme deneyimi Modern frontend frameworkleri (React / Angular / Vue.js) ile deneyim HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+) bilgisi Bankacılık domain bilgisi (EFT, FAST, SWIFT, krediler, mevduat, kartlı ödeme sistemleri vb.) KVKK, BDDK, ISO 27001 farkındalığı İyi seviyede İngilizce Takım çalışmasına yatkın, proaktif yaklaşım sahibi Hibrit çalışma modeline uyum sağlayabilecek (haftada 3 gün ofis) Tercihen İstanbul Anadolu Yakası’nda ikamet eden Görev ve Sorumluluklar Bankacılık uygulamaları için yüksek performanslı backend servisleri ve API’ler geliştirmek İş analistleri tarafından hazırlanan fonksiyonel gereksinimleri teknik çözümlere dönüştürmek Mikroservis mimarisine uygun uygulamalar geliştirmek ve mevcut servisleri iyileştirmek İç ve dış sistemlerle entegrasyon geliştirmeleri yapmak (REST/SOAP servisler, mesajlaşma altyapıları) Yazılım geliştirme sürecinde unit, integration ve contract testleri oluşturmak CI/CD süreçlerine uygun kod geliştirmek ve versiyon kontrol sistemlerini kullanmak Agile/Scrum metodolojisi ile çalışan ekiplerde aktif rol almak Performans, güvenlik ve ölçeklenebilirlik konularında geliştirmeler yapmak Canlıya alma süreçlerinde aktif katılım

title: Full stack  Next.js - Nest.js
description: iletişim için omergezer11@gmail.com 5327741594 LÜTFEN SADECE AŞAĞIDAKİ ŞARTLARA UYGUN ADAYLAR BAŞVURSUN, ( 2 TAM ZAMANLI 2 PART TİME DANIŞMAN +5 YİL DENEYİMLİ NextJs VE NestJs UZMANI ARIYORUZ ) Lütfen aşağıdaki şartlara uygun adaylar başvursunlar. Hemen başlayacak 5+ Yıl Deneyimli Uzman Next.js Developer Arıyoruz! Önemli: Lütfen yalnızca belirtilen tüm gereksinimleri karşılayan adaylar başvuru yapsın. 5 yıldan az deneyimi olan adayların başvurmaması rica olunur. Freelance çalışacak uzmanlarda alınacaktır.Tam zamanlı çalışacak adayları da değerlendirecektir. Pozisyon: Full Stack Developer (Öncelik: Next.js-Nest.js) Ekibimize, büyük ölçekli ve uzun vadeli projelerde aktif rol alacak, özellikle Next.js tarafında güçlü ve deneyimli bir takım arkadaşı arıyoruz. Yüksek performanslı, ölçeklenebilir ve modern teknolojilerle geliştirilmiş projelerde çalışmaktan keyif alıyorsanız, aradığımız kişi siz olabilirsiniz. Zorunlu Nitelikler Minimum 5 yıl yazılım geliştirme deneyimi Next.js konusunda ileri seviye ve gerçek proje deneyimi Nest.js hakkında güçlü bilgi PostgreSQL ile aktif çalışma deneyimi TanStack React Query ile uygulamalı proje tecrübesi Büyük ve karmaşık projelerde görev almış olmak Temiz kod prensiplerine hakimiyet Güçlü analitik düşünme ve problem çözme yeteneği Tercih Sebepleri DevOps bilgisi (CI/CD süreçleri, deployment, sunucu yönetimi vb.) GraphQL deneyimi Projelerimiz Turhost da fiziki sunucularımızda bulunmaktadır. Test ortamı için ve canlı için birer sunucumuz mevcuttur. Uzman arkadaşla yapacağımız sözleşmede belirteceğimiz gibi ay içinde hiç bir hizmet alınmasa veya dört günden az ihtiyaç olsa bile ay sonunda (4) dört günlük 10,000 TL (onbinlira) ödeme yapılacaktır. Eğer ay içinde aldığımız hizmet gün sayısı artarsa gün sayısı x 2500TL olarak ödeme yapılacaktır. Çalışma trelloda kayıtlı maddeler size gösterilir ne kadar zamanda yapılacaklarını birlikte belirleyip başlanacaktır. Tam zamanlı çalışacak arkadaşların devops bilgileri ortanın üstünde olmalıdır. NestJs ve frontende de nextjs de mutlak tecrübe istiyoruz. Tam zamanlı çalışma zoom üzerinden saat 09,00-18,00 arasında ekran paylaşılarak yapılacaktır. Maaş 65.000TL dir. Eğer tüm gereksinimleri karşılıyorsanız ve özellikle Next.js tarafında güçlü bir Senior Developer iseniz, başvurunuzu bekliyoruz. Tekrar hatırlatma: 5 yıldan az deneyimi olan adayların başvurmaması rica olunur.

title: Senior React Native Developer
description: ABOUT Jotform Jotform is a San Francisco-based SaaS company with more than 35 million users worldwide. We are thriving and growing, and we’ve never needed outside funding. That’s because we like keeping things agile, independent and fun. Jotform believes everyone should be able to create their own online forms. Our 10,000+ ready-made form templates, 100+ integrations and more than 380 widgets have made us one of the most popular online form builders for organizations of all sizes — from small businesses to enterprises. Since our inception in 2006, our mission has been to help users create, manage and share online forms and receive responses in the easiest way possible. ABOUT THE ROLE Jotform is seeking Senior React Native Developers in our Ankara office, located at a relaxed fun environment in Hacettepe University Teknokent. As a rapidly growing company we are hiring for similar positions continuously and once an opportunity matches with your qualifications, we will contact you immediately. Here’s what you will be doing: Work on React Native to create Android/iOS Apps Work on ReactJS to develop web applications Develop cross-browser, cross-platform compatible solutions Develop scalable, reliable, maintainable and reusable code Deliver solutions in a continuous integration flow to live system having 30 million users Test your code and solutions with A/B tests and/or via feedbacks from the user testing services Work closely with product management, back-end developers, DevOps and designers Come up with ideas to improve user experience and openly sharing them with the team Attend hackathons with utmost passion to try new things Education & Work Experience & Technical Requirements: Bachelor’s degree in CS/CENG or in a related technical field or equivalent practical experience 6 years of experiences in Frontend or Mobile Development Deep knowledge of React Native, ReactJS and Redux Proficiency in JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, AJAX Working experience with Git Preferably experience in SaaS Excellent command of English Superior communication and interpersonal skills A passion to learn and keep up with the cutting edge technologies Ability to write high-performance, maintainable and reusable code Ability to work independently with minimal supervision Jotform PERKS High growth-paced environment with collaborative and unique team culture Generous market competitive total compensation package Health Insurance Professional Growth & Career Opportunities: We support your personal and professional development with educational materials and expenses & relevant conferences abroad to stay up to date with the latest industry trends & online courses or coaching - and support you pursuing ones that you are passionate about! Challenging projects, regular feedback, healthy competition Fun & Relax working environment: When we’re in the office; music, jeans and t-shirts are the norm & kitchens stocked with healthy & tasty snacks & drinks OUR PROCESS We’ll review your application along with all the others we receive and pick the top profiles for a screening call. In many cases due to time constraints and our candidate volume, only the short-listed candidates are contacted but we do consider each application carefully. If you have been selected as a short-listed candidate, we will contact you for a short screening call to get to know you better. If you don’t get a call, please don’t be disappointed! We receive many applications for each role and have to prioritize who we speak to. Thank you for taking the time to apply for a position at Jotform! Jotform is an Equal Opportunity Employer.
